title: cordia humilis
intro: Cordia humilis, also known as the wild lime or buttonwood, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia humilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Cordia humilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
